title: Formation of the Library Club
overview: After receiving a text from the "Shepherd", Kakei gets has a sudden intuition that the girl he saw handing out posters is in danger and runs back to pull her out of the way, however they trip and Kakei accidentally gropes her breast, resulting in the news spreading that he is a molester.

title: Lost and Found
overview: Kakei and the others start their Shiomi Happy Project activities by picking up trash and find a beautiful tuning fork...

title: Lonely Song Princess
overview: Kakei and Suzuki get help from the genius of the cafeteria while Shirasaki and the others pay the Song Princess a visit…

title: A New Library Club
overview: The Library Club members don costumes to advertise Appllio's Spring Fair and then take a trip to the bathhouse to get to know each other better…

title: The Truth Behind the Messages
overview: The Library Club starts getting more jobs, but this spike in popularity has its drawbacks... Meanwhile, Kakei zeroes in on the Shepherd's identity.

title: The Magic Library
overview: Kakei finally pays a visit to the magic library from his visions and learns more about the secrets of the Shepherds.

title: The Library Club's Day Off
overview: The girls of the Library Club invite Kakei out on a group date, but Kodachi has Shepherd work for him even on his day off.

title: The Magic Book
overview: Suzuki writes a play for the Library Club to perform, but will circumstances force her to confront her true self...?

title: The Song Princess' Choice
overview: As the Library Club prepares for the festival, Misono thinks back on her life of singing and decides what she wants for the future.

title: Confession
overview: More is revealed about Kakei and Kodachi's past, and Kakei meets Shirasaki's little sister while Kodachi causes trouble.

title: Decision
overview: The Happy Project's Minafes goes head to head with the student council as Kakei makes his decision about being a Shepherd.

title: A Good Librarian Like a Good Shepherd
overview: It's finally the day of Minafes and the symposium. Which will get more people? Will Kakei be able to save Shirasaki?
